name: well-architected review: each json pillar carries findings trade_offs and risk_tier slots
command:
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/well-architected-review.sh" --workload "resilient multi-region platform" --out-dir out --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out/2026-06-08T120000Z.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.pillars.every(p=>"findings" in p && "trade_offs" in p && "risk_tier" in p && "grounding_sources" in p)?0:1)' && echo slots-ok 1>&2
